items.title: Problem-Solving Patterns
items.description: Mock interviews are where you train pattern recognition under pressure — the patterns you can't name in 30 seconds will trip you live.

items.title: Big-O Complexity
items.description: Every coding mock ends with a Big-O question — rehearse stating time AND space without hesitation.

items.title: Two-Pointers & Sliding Window
items.description: Two-pointer / sliding-window problems are interview staples; they reward clean templates over creative coding.

items.title: Time-Space Tradeoffs
items.description: Senior loops often add a 'now reduce memory' twist; rehearse stating the tradeoff before being asked.

items.title: Communication & Collaboration
items.description: The communication skills mocks train (clarification, narration, recovery) transfer directly to day-to-day technical collaboration.
